title: Apply Transform Over Each Element in Array
titleCn: 转换数组中的每个元素

testcases.input: arr = [1,2,3], fn = function plusone(n) { return n + 1; } Output: [2,3,4] Explanation: const newArray = map(arr, plusone); // [2,3,4] The function increases each value in the array by one.
testcases.expectedOutput: [2,3,4] Explanation: const newArray = map(arr, plusone); // [2,3,4] The function increases each value in the array by one.

testcases.input: arr = [1,2,3], fn = function plusI(n, i) { return n + i; } Output: [1,3,5] Explanation: The function increases each value by the index it resides in.
testcases.expectedOutput: [1,3,5] Explanation: The function increases each value by the index it resides in.

testcases.input: arr = [10,20,30], fn = function constant() { return 42; } Output: [42,42,42] Explanation: The function always returns 42.
